        (M3e.Heading.view

            [ M3e.BottomSheetAction.view [] [ Kit.text "Google Keep" ]
            , M3e.ListAction.supportingText (Native.span [] [ Kit.text "Add to a note" ])
            ]
        , M3e.ListAction.view []
            [ M3e.BottomSheetAction.view [] [ Kit.text "Google Docs" ]
